meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: AnySearch
products.tagline: Real-time structured search trusted by agents and developers
products.summaryZh: 实时结构化搜索，受代理和开发者信赖
products.descriptionZh: 面向智能体的搜索工具，而非搜索框。AI智能体的表现取决于其接收的信息质量。接入AnySearch后，您的智能体将从并行搜索的可信来源中获取经过筛选、去重和结构化的信息，从而生成更可靠的结果。免费开始使用。
products.description: A search tool for agents, not a search box. AI agents are only as good as the information they receive. When connected to AnySearch, your agent gets filtered, de-duplicated, and structured information from trusted sources searched in parallel, helping it produce more reliable results. Free to start.

products.name: Typeahead 2.0
products.tagline: Private AI autocomplete for every app on your Mac
products.summaryZh: 适用于Mac上所有应用的私人AI自动补全
products.descriptionZh: Typeahead 2.0 是一款适用于 Mac 上所有应用的隐私 AI 自动补全工具，支持按应用设定写作风格、适配任意语言，并能根据你的工作方式智能调整上下文。如今它更具可定制性，日常使用也更实用，同时内存占用更轻、后台运行更快。你还能通过隐私洞察功能查看节省的时间。一次性购买 79 美元，免费更新，无需订阅。
products.description: Typeahead 2.0 is private AI autocomplete for every app on your Mac, with writing styles per app, support for any language, and smarter context that adapts to how you work. It now feels more customizable and more useful every day, while staying lighter on memory and faster in the background. You also get private Insights to see your time saved. One-time $79 purchase, free updates, no subscription.

products.name: Octolens
products.tagline: Social listening for the agent era
products.summaryZh: 面向智能体时代的社会化聆听
products.descriptionZh: 你的AI智能体可以读取代码、文档和CRM，但无法访问Reddit、Hacker News、播客或新闻。Octolens是一个覆盖全网提及信息的统一API。通过API、webhooks和MCP提供经AI过滤的JSON数据。可将其接入Slack、CRM、数据仓库或你的智能体。
products.description: Your AI agents read your code, docs, and CRM but can't see Reddit, Hacker News, podcasts, or the news. Octolens is one API for every mention across the internet. AI-filtered JSON via API, webhooks & MCP. Pipe it into Slack, your CRM, your warehouse, or your agents.

products.name: Sunrise
products.tagline: A real planner for Google Tasks
products.summaryZh: Google Tasks 的实用规划工具
products.descriptionZh: Google Tasks 适合随手记东西，但规划日程体验很差。没有今日视图，没有逾期分类，无法一眼看清本周待办事项，只有扁平列表。Sunrise 是基于 Google Tasks 构建的日程规划工具：查看今日任务、捕捉逾期事项、浏览未来安排，并通过看板视图整理工作——所有操作都与你的 Google Tasks 列表同步，数据仍保留在 Google 中。
products.description: Google Tasks is fine for jotting things down. It’s terrible for planning your day. No Today view. No overdue section. No way to see what’s due this week at a glance. Just flat lists. Sunrise is a planner built on top of Google Tasks. See today’s tasks, catch what’s overdue, scroll through what’s coming up, and organize work on a kanban board — all synced with your existing Google Tasks lists. Your data stays in Google.

products.name: AirKaren
products.tagline: AI that fights customer service for you
products.summaryZh: 为您代劳的客服对抗AI
products.descriptionZh: AirKaren 是一款免费为你对抗客服的AI。告诉Karen你的航班出了什么问题，她会引用相关法规、提交索赔申请，并追讨你应得的赔偿。Karen会拨打客服热线、发送邮件、填写表格，让你从此无需亲力亲为。我们目前从航空业起步，未来几周将拓展至其他行业。
products.description: AirKaren is the AI that fights customer service for you, completely for free. Tell Karen what went wrong with your flight, and she cites the regulation, files your claim, and chases down what you're owed. Karen will call customer support hotlines, send emails, and fill out forms so you never have to again. We're starting with airlines and expanding to other industries in the coming weeks.

products.name: Stanley Studio
products.tagline: The AI video editor you hire that edits like a human
products.summaryZh: 你雇佣的AI视频编辑器，剪辑方式如同真人。
products.descriptionZh: Stanley 专为那些拍摄精彩视频后却任其沉睡在相册中的用户而生。将原始素材发给 Stanley，即可获得一条带字幕的成片。无需时间线操作，无需手动调整字幕，也无需花数小时寻找完美配乐。只需告诉 Stanley 你的需求，它就能完成端到端剪辑：口播、Vlog、播客片段、UGC 内容，无论你的领域需要什么。而且完全免费。上传素材，即可获得成片。
products.description: Stanley is built for anyone who films great videos and then lets them die in their camera roll. Send Stanley raw footage and get back a finished, captioned video. No timelines, no manually tweaking captions, no spending hours hunting for the perfect song. Just tell Stanley what you want and it edits end-to-end: talking heads, vlogs, podcast cuts, UGC, whatever your niche needs. And it's free. Upload footage, get a video.

products.name: Edgee Claude Code Compressor V2
products.tagline: Fewer tokens, same context, 50% cost reduction
products.summaryZh: 更少令牌，相同上下文，成本降低50%
products.descriptionZh: Compression V2 通过两层三种技术降低编码代理的令牌费用：更精准的工具结果修剪、新的任务感知工具表面缩减，以及输出简洁性。可直接用于 Claude Code、Codex、OpenCode 和 Cursor。语义无损。
products.description: Compression V2 cuts coding-agent token bills with three techniques across two layers: sharper tool result trimming, new task-aware tool surface reduction, and output brevity. Drop-in for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, and Cursor. Semantically lossless.

products.name: Astryx
products.tagline: A customizable, agent-ready open-source design system
products.summaryZh: 一个可自定义、支持智能体的开源设计系统
products.descriptionZh: Astryx 是 Meta 基于 React 和 StyleX 构建的开源设计系统，包含无障碍组件、品牌级主题、模板、暗色模式、CLI/MCP 文档，以及面向开发者和 AI 代理的定制路径。
products.description: Astryx is Meta’s open-source design system built on React and StyleX. It includes accessible components, brand-level themes, templates, dark mode, CLI/MCP docs, and customization paths for both developers and AI agents.

products.name: CodeMote
products.tagline: Claude Code, Codex, any CLI agent. Driven from your iPhone
products.summaryZh: Claude Code、Codex，任何CLI代理。由你的iPhone驱动。
products.descriptionZh: CodeMote 将你的 iPhone 与机器或 VPS 配对，为你提供真实的会话。锁屏界面上的实时终端，代理需要审批时推送通知，完整的差异对比，全面的 Git 流程。直接加密连接。你的代码永远不会触及我们的服务器。
products.description: CodeMote pairs your iPhone to your machine or VPS and gives you the real sessions. Live terminal on your lock screen, push when your agent needs approval, full diffs, complete git flow. Direct encrypted connection. Your code never touches our servers.

products.name: Nixmac
products.tagline: Nix-darwin that speaks plain English
products.summaryZh: 说大白话的Nix-darwin
products.descriptionZh: nixmac 将你的 Mac 转变为可复现、受版本控制的系统。用简单英语描述你的需求——它会编写 Nix 配置、构建并安全应用。
products.description: nixmac turns your Mac into a reproducible, version-controlled system. Describe what you want in plain English — it writes the Nix, builds it, and applies it safely.

products.name: Mozaik
products.tagline: TypeScript runtime for self-organizing AI agents
products.summaryZh: 用于自组织AI代理的TypeScript运行时
products.descriptionZh: Mozaik 使自主智能体团队能够并行工作、响应事件、智能沟通，并在执行过程中自主决定协作如何进行。
products.description: Mozaik enables autonomous agent teams to work concurrently, react to events, communicate intelligently, and decide how collaboration should unfold during execution.

products.name: Cadence
products.tagline: Record once, send confidently
products.summaryZh: 一次录制，自信发送
products.descriptionZh: Cadence是唯一一款在您点击停止录制瞬间，即可轻松完善视频的屏幕录制工具。AI能即时转换口音、应用清晰语音配音、消除背景噪音，并自动为您生成文字记录和截图。
products.description: Cadence is the only screen recorder that effortlessly perfects your video the moment you hit stop. The AI instantly transforms accents, applies clear voice dubbing, removes background noise, and automatically builds transcripts and screenshots for you.

products.name: HirePilot
products.tagline: AI job search assistant that saves time & lands interviews
products.summaryZh: AI求职助手，节省时间，助你获得面试机会
products.descriptionZh: HirePilot 是您的 AI 求职助手。浏览职位列表，在 LinkedIn、Indeed 和 Workday 上秒速自动填写申请，在一个清晰流程中追踪所有职位，并通过个性化外联直接联系招聘经理，让您减少申请时间，增加面试机会。
products.description: HirePilot is your AI-powered job search copilot. Browse job listings, auto-fill applications in seconds on LinkedIn, Indeed, and Workday, track every role in one clean pipeline, and reach hiring managers directly with personalized outreach, so you spend less time applying and more time interviewing.

products.name: qbrin
products.tagline: Enterprise AI trust layer with citations & 20x fewer tokens
products.summaryZh: 企业级AI信任层，支持引用且令牌数减少20倍
products.descriptionZh: Qbrin 是面向AI代理的可信企业层，专为无法承受错误答案的企业打造。它将来自文档、Slack、Gmail、工单、维基、数据库和系统的混乱企业知识，转化为结构化、有据可查的记忆，包含权限、来源、引用、时效性、关联关系和弃权机制。对于国防、医疗、无人机、安全、金融和合规领域的高风险团队，Qbrin帮助AI代理判断何时该信任什么、何时该作答。
products.description: Qbrin is a trusted enterprise layer for AI agents, built for companies that cannot afford wrong answers. It turns messy company knowledge from documents, Slack, Gmail, tickets, wikis, databases, and systems into structured, evidence-backed memory with permissions, provenance, citations, freshness, relationships, and abstention. For high-stakes teams in defense, medicine, drones, security, finance, and compliance, Qbrin helps AI agents know what to trust, when to answer.

products.name: Trendoff
products.tagline: Live 1v1 trend battles, judged by AI
products.summaryZh: 实时1v1趋势对决，由AI评判
products.descriptionZh: Trendoff 将任何趋势变为实时 1v1 对战。AI 判定胜者，而非可被操纵的投票。双方玩家同时进行。你可在屏幕上实时看到双方分数上涨。计时结束，高分者胜。宝石用于购买外观，绝不提供优势。
products.description: Trendoff makes any trend a live 1v1 battle. AI picks the winner, not a vote you can rig. Both players go at the same time. You watch both scores go up live on your screen. Higher score wins when the buzzer hits. Gems buy looks, never an edge.

products.name: ScreenCI
products.tagline: Product videos that automatically update on every release
products.summaryZh: 每次发布时自动更新的产品视频
products.descriptionZh: ScreenCI帮助SaaS团队保持产品视频与产品同步。它将端到端测试转化为视频。编码代理可从代码库或实时应用中生成脚本，并在CI中自动运行。团队成员可在浏览器中微调视频，将其本地化为70多种语言，并将审核通过的版本发布到始终提供最新版本的静态URL上。
products.description: ScreenCI helps SaaS teams keep product videos in sync with their product. It turns E2E tests into videos. A coding agent can draft scripts from your codebase or live app, which can run automatically in CI. Anyone on the team can fine-tune videos in the browser, localize them into 70+ languages, and publish approved versions to static URLs that always serve the latest version.

products.name: Foundera
products.tagline: AI-Native Startup Accelerator Platform for Founders
products.summaryZh: 面向创始人的AI原生创业加速器平台
products.descriptionZh: 在一个平台上，借助AI、投资人、导师和合作伙伴，构建、发展并壮大你的初创公司。Foundera是一个一站式初创平台，旨在加速创业旅程。它提供一系列工具，帮助创始人验证创意、构建产品并管理增长。该平台将用户与关键资源连接起来，包括AI工具、投资人、导师、顾问和战略合作伙伴，以简化创业和规模化发展的流程。
products.description: Build, raise, and grow your startup with AI, investors, mentors and partners in one place.Foundera is an all-in-one startup platform designed to accelerate the entrepreneurial journey. It provides a suite of tools to help founders validate ideas, build products, and manage growth. The platform connects users with essential resources including AI tools, investors, mentors, advisors, and strategic partners to streamline the process of starting and scaling a business.

products.name: Seviq AI
products.tagline: Fix your AI visibility yourself and skip pricey agency fees
products.summaryZh: 自行优化AI可见度，省去高昂代理费用
products.descriptionZh: GEO问题真实存在，但代理机构的收费只有大公司能承受。90%的产品在AI搜索中不可见，因此我们打造了Seviq，以一次性的实惠价格解决这个问题。我们不只是告诉你是否可见——你早已知道答案。通过一份可下载修复文件的实时审计和三阶段路线图，我们精确展示如何开始被搜索到。你的报告是一个可分享的托管交互式网页，而非PDF。无需登录或存储。
products.description: The GEO problem is real, but agencies charge prices only big companies can afford. 9 out of 10 products are invisible to AI search, so we built Seviq as an affordable one-time purchase. We don't just tell you if you're visible, you already know you're not. We show you exactly how you can start appearing, through a live audit with fixes downloadable as files and a three-phase roadmap. Your report is a hosted interactive webpage you can share, not a PDF. No login or storage required.

products.name: Lumina
products.tagline: Stop Feeling Like a Fraud. Start Owning Your Success.
products.summaryZh: 不再觉得自己是冒牌货。开始真正拥有你的成功。
products.descriptionZh: 面向专业人士的数据驱动工具包，用于识别、管理和消除冒充者综合征。将自我怀疑转化为自信从容。
products.description: A data-driven toolkit for professionals to identify, manage, and dismantle imposter syndrome. Transform fraudulence into fluency.

products.name: AppOrbit
products.tagline: See what mobile apps actually hit the bank with verified MRR
products.summaryZh: 查看哪些移动应用真正触达银行，并带有经过验证的MRR
products.descriptionZh: AppOrbit 是一个展示已验证MRR的移动应用排行榜与交易市场。在这里发布项目、展示真实增长数据，并直接接收有意收购的买家联系。平台配备独特太空功能：🌍 收入地球仪：3D地球仪追踪顶级宇航员及其应用，直观显示各国收入表现。🛸 UFO发射：对其他宇航员隐藏你的应用。👽 外星人模式：匿名展示数据，让指标自己说话。
products.description: AppOrbit is a leaderboard and marketplace for mobile apps with verified MRR. List a project, show off real growth, and get contacted directly by buyers looking to acquire. Built with some unique space features: 🌍 Revenue Globe: A 3D Earth globe to track the biggest astronauts, their apps, and see which countries are crushing the revenue game. 🛸 UFO Launch: Hide your app from other astronauts. 👽 Alien Mode: Go anonymous and let the metrics do the talking.
